description: A privileged user initiates a PSM session to a critical Windows server and executes suspicious commands that violate the organization's privileged access policies.

metadata.title: CyberArk PSM Session Misuse Investigation
metadata.summary: A privileged user initiates a PSM session to a critical Windows server and executes suspicious commands that violate the organization's privileged access policies. The security team must investigate the session, review audit logs, and determine whether the access was legitimate.
risks: Suspicious or malicious commands executed during PSM sessions
Lack of proper session monitoring or alerting
controls: PSM session recording and keystroke logging
learning_objectives: Apply CyberArk governance controls to mitigate misuse
Review and analyze privileged access audit logs
